arguments.request: Generate a VTD OpenSCENARIO case on an urban road in China: ego vehicle starts at 30 km/h; the scenario trigger is simulation time 5 seconds; at that trigger the ego vehicle performs a lane change to the left by one lane; the simulation stops at 20 seconds. Keep the XML minimal but schema-valid.

open_questions: Which target lane should the lane change use?

arguments.name: ego
arguments.query: VTD ego vehicle runtime naming context for China urban OpenSCENARIO minimal scenario

asset_lookup.query: VTD ego vehicle runtime naming context for China urban OpenSCENARIO minimal scenario

result.name: ego

name_resolution.reason: Runtime asset names must map to a known VTD asset.

result.query: VTD ego vehicle runtime naming context for China urban OpenSCENARIO minimal scenario

arguments.query: ego vehicle runtime asset name for VTD OpenSCENARIO China urban road

name_resolution.reason: Runtime asset names must map to a known VTD asset.

ranking_reasons.query: ego vehicle runtime asset name for VTD OpenSCENARIO China urban road
ranking_reasons.resolution_reason: Runtime asset names must map to a known VTD asset.

arguments.query: SimulationTimeCondition element OpenSCENARIO 1.4 attributes value rule used in trigger

hits.summary: Simulation-time trigger condition. It compares the running storyboard's simulation time against a required value using the supplied rule.
hits.title: SimulationTimeCondition

constraints: Required attributes: entityRef, freespace, rule, value
Some contextual variants of this element are deprecated in the local XSD.
strategy_summary: Resolve contextual variant before emitting this shared element name.
Wire required entity reference: entityRef.
hits.summary: Schema-derived TimeHeadwayCondition element with context-dependent type variants captured from the local XSD.
hits.title: TimeHeadwayCondition

constraints: Some contextual variants of this element are deprecated in the local XSD.
strategy_summary: Resolve contextual variant before emitting this shared element name.
Keep required children present: TimeToCollisionConditionTarget.
hits.summary: Schema-derived TimeToCollisionCondition element with context-dependent type variants captured from the local XSD.
hits.title: TimeToCollisionCondition

result.description: Simulation-time trigger condition. It compares the running storyboard's simulation time against a required value using the supplied rule.

arguments.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<OpenSCENARIO>
  <FileHeader revMajor="1" revMinor="4" date="2026-05-19T00:00:00" description="China urban ego lane change left at 5 seconds" author="claude_code_gpt"/>
  <CatalogLocations/>
  <RoadNetwork/>
  <Entities>
    <ScenarioObject name="ego">
      <Vehicle name="ego_vehicle" vehicleCategory="car">
        <BoundingBox>
          <Center x="1.5" y="0.0" z="0.9"/>
          <Dimensions width="1.8" length="4.5" height="1.8"/>
        </BoundingBox>
        <Performance maxSpeed="69.444" maxAcceleration="10.0" maxDeceleration="10.0"/>
        <Axles>
          <FrontAxle maxSteering="0.5" wheelDiameter="0.6" trackWidth="1.6" positionX="3.0" positionZ="0.3"/>
          <RearAxle maxSteering="0.0" wheelDiameter="0.6" trackWidth="1.6" positionX="0.0" positionZ="0.3"/>
        </Axles>
      </Vehicle>
    </ScenarioObject>
  </Entities>
  <Storyboard>
    <Init>
      <Actions>
        <Private entityRef="ego">
          <PrivateAction>
            <LongitudinalAction>
              <SpeedAction>
                <SpeedActionDynamics dynamicsShape="step" value="0.0" dynamicsDimension="time"/>
                <SpeedActionTarget>
                  <AbsoluteTargetSpeed value="8.333333"/>
                </SpeedActionTarget>
              </SpeedAction>
            </LongitudinalAction>
          </PrivateAction>
        </Private>
      </Actions>
    </Init>
    <Story name="LaneChangeStory">
      <Act name="LaneChangeAct">
        <ManeuverGroup name="LaneChangeGroup" maximumExecutionCount="1">
          <Actors selectTriggeringEntities="false">
            <EntityRef entityRef="ego"/>
          </Actors>
          <Maneuver name="LaneChangeManeuver">
            <Event name="LaneChangeEvent" priority="overwrite">
              <Action name="LaneChangeLeft">
                <PrivateAction>
                  <LateralAction>
                    <LaneChangeAction>
                      <LaneChangeActionDynamics dynamicsShape="sinusoidal" value="3.0" dynamicsDimension="time"/>
                      <LaneChangeTarget>
                        <AbsoluteTargetLane value="-1"/>
                      </LaneChangeTarget>
                    </LaneChangeAction>
                  </LateralAction>
                </PrivateAction>
              </Action>
              <StartTrigger>
                <ConditionGroup>
                  <Condition name="StartAtFiveSeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
                    <ByValueCondition>
                      <SimulationTimeCondition value="5.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
                    </ByValueCondition>
                  </Condition>
                </ConditionGroup>
              </StartTrigger>
            </Event>
          </Maneuver>
        </ManeuverGroup>
        <StartTrigger>
          <ConditionGroup>
            <Condition name="ActStartAtFiveSeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
              <ByValueCondition>
                <SimulationTimeCondition value="5.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
              </ByValueCondition>
            </Condition>
          </ConditionGroup>
        </StartTrigger>
        <StopTrigger/>
      </Act>
    </Story>
    <StopTrigger>
      <ConditionGroup>
        <Condition name="StopAtTwentySeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
          <ByValueCondition>
            <SimulationTimeCondition value="20.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
          </ByValueCondition>
        </Condition>
      </ConditionGroup>
    </StopTrigger>
  </Storyboard>
</OpenSCENARIO>

assumptions: The target lane is resolved as AbsoluteTargetLane value="-1".

arguments.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<OpenSCENARIO>
  <FileHeader revMajor="1" revMinor="4" date="2026-05-19T00:00:00" description="China urban ego lane change left at 5 seconds" author="claude_code_gpt"/>
  <CatalogLocations/>
  <RoadNetwork/>
  <Entities>
    <ScenarioObject name="ego">
      <Vehicle name="ego_vehicle" vehicleCategory="car">
        <BoundingBox>
          <Center x="1.5" y="0.0" z="0.9"/>
          <Dimensions width="1.8" length="4.5" height="1.8"/>
        </BoundingBox>
        <Performance maxSpeed="69.444" maxAcceleration="10.0" maxDeceleration="10.0"/>
        <Axles>
          <FrontAxle maxSteering="0.5" wheelDiameter="0.6" trackWidth="1.6" positionX="3.0" positionZ="0.3"/>
          <RearAxle maxSteering="0.0" wheelDiameter="0.6" trackWidth="1.6" positionX="0.0" positionZ="0.3"/>
        </Axles>
      </Vehicle>
    </ScenarioObject>
  </Entities>
  <Storyboard>
    <Init>
      <Actions>
        <Private entityRef="ego">
          <PrivateAction>
            <LongitudinalAction>
              <SpeedAction>
                <SpeedActionDynamics dynamicsShape="step" value="0.0" dynamicsDimension="time"/>
                <SpeedActionTarget>
                  <AbsoluteTargetSpeed value="8.333333"/>
                </SpeedActionTarget>
              </SpeedAction>
            </LongitudinalAction>
          </PrivateAction>
        </Private>
      </Actions>
    </Init>
    <Story name="LaneChangeStory">
      <Act name="LaneChangeAct">
        <ManeuverGroup name="LaneChangeGroup" maximumExecutionCount="1">
          <Actors selectTriggeringEntities="false">
            <EntityRef entityRef="ego"/>
          </Actors>
          <Maneuver name="LaneChangeManeuver">
            <Event name="LaneChangeEvent" priority="overwrite">
              <Action name="LaneChangeLeft">
                <PrivateAction>
                  <LateralAction>
                    <LaneChangeAction>
                      <LaneChangeActionDynamics dynamicsShape="sinusoidal" value="3.0" dynamicsDimension="time"/>
                      <LaneChangeTarget>
                        <AbsoluteTargetLane value="-1"/>
                      </LaneChangeTarget>
                    </LaneChangeAction>
                  </LateralAction>
                </PrivateAction>
              </Action>
              <StartTrigger>
                <ConditionGroup>
                  <Condition name="StartAtFiveSeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
                    <ByValueCondition>
                      <SimulationTimeCondition value="5.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
                    </ByValueCondition>
                  </Condition>
                </ConditionGroup>
              </StartTrigger>
            </Event>
          </Maneuver>
        </ManeuverGroup>
        <StartTrigger>
          <ConditionGroup>
            <Condition name="ActStartAtFiveSeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
              <ByValueCondition>
                <SimulationTimeCondition value="5.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
              </ByValueCondition>
            </Condition>
          </ConditionGroup>
        </StartTrigger>
        <StopTrigger/>
      </Act>
    </Story>
    <StopTrigger>
      <ConditionGroup>
        <Condition name="StopAtTwentySeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
          <ByValueCondition>
            <SimulationTimeCondition value="20.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
          </ByValueCondition>
        </Condition>
      </ConditionGroup>
    </StopTrigger>
  </Storyboard>
</OpenSCENARIO>
